response:
I want 10 weaknesses of Dell from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:  
1. [Company]'s earnings fell 38.6% from 2019 to 2020.  
2. [Company]'s EPS down $0.93 in 2020 from the previous year.  
3. [Company]'s share prices down 34% from 2019 to 2020.  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product category, laptops.  
5. Total liabilities increased from $271,547,000 to $356,459,000 from 2018 to 2019.  
6. [Company] produced 4.7% fewer units in the first half of 2020 as a result of weak demand from [specific industry] due to the [event].  
7. [Competitor] achieved a 7% sales increase from 2019 to 2020, while [Company] has no offerings in [specific product category].  
8. [Competitor] achieved its goal to provide [specific feature] in 25% of its [product] by January 2020. [Company]'s [product] has no [specific feature].  
9. Sales to [Company]'s top ten customers represented approximately 54% of their net sales during fiscal year 2019.  
10. [Company] faces multiple pending lawsuits in 2020, from [type of charge] to [type of violation].
